name: New Name Incoming

sheet.name: New Name Incoming
sheet.background_story:
In her previous life, she was known as Big Bertha.  Not fat, just big boned.  Wandering around aimlessly through the Forsaken Lands she really didn't do much under her big-brimmed hat.  That was, until the Celestium appeared.  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i1W-XOYgMPU&t=12s

It provided a call to the infected to help them find a cure... there already was a cure out and about, one that would cost a few coin
https://opensea.io/assets/ethereum/0x1d38150f1fd989fb89ab19518a9c4e93c5554634/43

 But the Celestium offered healing for free.  That caught her attention, and so she entered.

Still confused, she wrote this song, and put her trust in FATE. https://youtu.be/5F66nF50mo4?si=3SJvofZOtDxB-_iQ

...to be continued/edited/etc kek.
